backup.method: git archive of HEAD tracked files
backup.note: The workspace zip was deleted after the external copy was verified, so the large archive is not intended for Git commit.

githubCli.manualOwnerActionRequired: Confirm GitHub 2FA, recovery email, and recovery codes in the browser. Do not share codes.

cloudflareWrangler.manualOwnerActionRequired: Confirm Cloudflare 2FA, account recovery method, billing contact, and emergency access in the browser. Do not share secrets.
warnings: Wrangler can read login state but failed to write its log file because of EPERM under the Wrangler log directory.
Proxy environment variables were detected by Wrangler.

largestWorkspaceCandidates.category: active subproject, do not delete as a whole

cleanupCandidatesRequireOwnerApproval: Old release-v0.4.0 through release-v0.4.4 build output directories after confirming no unique artifact is needed.
Old .tmp-* verification runtime directories after confirming no evidence not already committed is needed.
Old .verify-* and .strict-* runtime/profile directories after confirming no active validation depends on them.
Local npm/electron caches after confirming no offline rebuild requirement.
Duplicate downloaded v0.4.6 installer copies after confirming GitHub Release and D: backup remain readable.
Startup folder entries for AI Workbench Dev Server, OpenClaw Gateway, media apps, and OneNote only after owner confirms desired boot behavior.
Potentially unused installed apps such as duplicate Python versions, duplicate QGIS versions, media apps, remote-control tools, and vendor app stores only after owner approval.
blockedOwnerOnlyChecks: GitHub browser security page: verify 2FA, recovery email, recovery codes, and emergency access.
Cloudflare dashboard security page: verify 2FA, recovery method, billing contact, and emergency access.
Confirm where the D: external backup should be mirrored if D: is not considered durable enough.
